rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"ioredis throws at import time when the package is not installed, which naturally triggers the fallback mechanism rather than a runtime error later.","scope":"src/cache/redisAdapter.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Dynamic import defers the import-time throw, allowing the cacheManager to catch the error and fall back gracefully instead of crashing the process.","scope":"src/cache/cacheManager.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Cache adapters follow an interface pattern: a shared CacheAdapter interface in cacheAdapter.ts, with concrete implementations (redisAdapter, memoryAdapter) in separate files.","scope":"src/cache"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Using Result<T, E> from src/utils/result.ts for typed error handling lets the cache manager distinguish recoverable errors from fatal ones.","scope":"src/cache/cacheManager.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Sub-task failures during decompose abort the current path and fall back to runPipeline(), com
